title: Gree ERV B Series confirmed diagnostic codes
description: Manual-bound confirmed ERV diagnostics codes from the B Series service manual. Symptom-only rows are documented in audit only.
sourceName: Gree ERV B Series Service Manual EN FHBQG-D3.5B-D60B
notes: Only confirmed code rows E6 and L0 were imported; ordinary symptom rows were not promoted to runtime cards.
